info.name: SAP Sales and Distribution (SD) SAP Sales Quotation API
info.description:
Create, read, update, and delete sales quotations in SAP S/4HANA. This OData service (API_SALES_QUOTATION_SRV) supports the complete quotation lifecycle from creation through approval and conversion to sales orders. Quotations include header, item, partner, pricing element, and text entities.

Contact Support:
 Name: SAP Support

item.name: Retrieve a list of sales quotations

query.description: Maximum number of records to return

request.description: Returns a collection of sales quotation headers. Supports OData query options for filtering by quotation type, sales organization, sold-to party, validity dates, and status.
